name: Shark Hors D'oeuvres
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Shark meat, cut into 2-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine lemon juice, white wine, and garlic. Add shark pieces and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour.
2. Coat each fish piece first with seasoned flour, then sprinkle salt and pepper. Dip in beaten egg, and finally coat with bread crumbs.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C). Carefully lower fish pieces into the hot oil using tongs, ensuring not to overcrowd the pan. Fry until golden brown.
4. Using tongs, remove fish from the oil and place on a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil. Serve immediately with Creole mustard or tartar sauce.
